title: AiGovOps Beacon — managed policy
description: Set these via Chrome ExtensionInstallForcelist + ExtensionSettings, Edge mirror, Intune ADMX, or JAMF MCX. The extension auto-configures from these values.

tenantSalt.title: Per-tenant hostname salt
tenantSalt.description: Used to hash hostnames before they leave the browser. Required.

allowlist.title: AI service hostnames to record cleartext
allowlist.description: Anything not on this list is dropped at the source. Hostnames support a leading dot for subdomain match (e.g. '.openai.com').

rateLimitPerMinute.title: Receipt rate cap
rateLimitPerMinute.description: Hard cap on receipts per minute, per tab. Default 30.

tenantId.title: Tenant ID
tenantId.description: Opaque identifier sent with every receipt for routing.
